nasb.text: This He said, and after that He *said to them, “Our friend Lazarus has fallen asleep; but I go, so that I may awaken him out of sleep.”

esv.text: After saying these things, he said to them, “Our friend Lazarus has fallen asleep, but I go to awaken him.”

cnv.text: 耶穌說完了這些話，跟著又對他們說：“我們的朋友拉撒路睡了，我要去喚醒他。”

ccb.text: 接着耶稣又说：“我们的朋友拉撒路已经睡了，我去叫醒他。”

csbs.text: 耶稣讲了这些话，然后对他们说：“我们的朋友拉撒路睡了，我要去叫醒他。”
